sql_array: CREATE TABLE employees (id BIGINT PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR, department VARCHAR);
INSERT INTO employees (id, name, department) VALUES (1, 'Alice', 'IT'), (2, 'Bob', 'HR'), (3, 'Charlie', 'IT'), (4, 'David', 'HR');
SELECT name, department, rank_dense() OVER (PARTITION BY department ORDER BY id) AS department_rank FROM employees;
UPDATE employees SET department = 'Finance' WHERE id = 2;
SELECT department, COUNT(*) AS count, rank_dense() OVER (ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC) AS department_rank FROM employees GROUP BY department;
